chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 216 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 10.03.2025 For orders on MA 1608/24 For orders on office objections For orders on MA 1609/24 For hearing of main case Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Mari, Advocate along with Applicant Applicant Allah Dino seeks protective bail in FIR No. 98 of 2025 registered at police station Naushahro Feroze for offences punishable under Sections 420 & 406 PPC. Learned Counsel submits that the Applicant is innocent and has falsely been implicated in this case due to mala fide intention and ulterior motives; that Section 406 PPC does not come within the prohibitory clause of Section 497 Cr.P.C.; whereas Section 420 PPC is bailable; that the Applicant is law abiding citizen and intends to appear before the Trial Court but he feels apprehension of his arrest at the hands of police in order to humiliate and disgrace him; therefore, he needs protection in order to enable him to appear before the Trial Court. Without touching merits of the case, the Applicant is granted protective bail for five days subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Thirty Thousand only) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of seven days or whenever he surrenders himself before the Trial Court whichever is earlier. This Cr. Bail Application along with pending applications stands disposed of. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
